definition: A compound that carries the nissaraṇa family into dhātu-language without changing the governing escape logic.
notes: Use this record when a text explicitly names an element or domain of escape. The compound inherits the headword policy for nissaraṇa and should not be rewritten into generic liberation-language.

context_rules.context: In direct doctrinal translation of the compound
In prose where the compound order is smoother in English
context_rules.notes: Allowed alternate when the line reads more naturally that way.

example_phrases.notes: Compound governed by the nissaraṇa headword.
